name: Chocolate Chip Cookies II
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Measure the oatmeal and blend in a blender to a fine powder.
3. Cream the butter and both sugars. Add eggs and vanilla; mix together with flour, oatmeal, salt, baking powder, and soda. Add chocolate chips, Hershey bar, and nuts.
4. Roll into balls and place two inches apart on a cookie sheet. Bake for 10 minutes. Makes 112 cookies.
